title_en: In the Footsteps of Bardam the Brave

dialogues.text_en: Nothing left but to begin, then.

To complete this trial, we must pass through Bardam's Mettle and each tame a yol. How precisely we are to do this, I am not sure, but since countless warriors before us have succeeded, I imagine we'll muddle through somehow...
But enough talk! We have a Naadam to win!
I have stood upon more battlefields than I can count and lived to tell the tale. No bird will be my downfall!
First the trial, then the Naadam, then Doma, then Ala Mhigo! We'll be back home before you know it!
Quite frankly, if I cannot convince a large bird to follow me, then what do I have with the Xaela? Or my own countrymen, for that matter.
Thus spoke Nhaama: "Hunters in whose veins flows moonlight, show me your mettle!"
Pass, blood of my blood, for you are of the Dusk and of the Steppe.
Thus spoke Azim: "Warriors in whose veins flows sunlight, show me your mettle!"
Pass, blood of my blood, for you are of the Dawn and of the Steppe.
Yea, you who would walk after Bardam! He who was as strong as the earth, swift as a horse, brave as the thunder!
You who would become Warriors of the Steppe! With death will you fance!
The first trial is upon you...
Be not deceived by demons...
The second trial is upon you...
Be not tempted to rest, but fly across the Steppe as the wind...
The third trial is upon you... Be not afraid of falling stars...
Yea, you worthy successors of Bardam! Yours is the Steppe and everything in it!
Two failures are yours to bear... All will be held to account... All will know the end...
So this is the hero's path... Let's prove ourselves worthy!
Nice of them to afford us the chance to limber up.
A herd of beasts!?
That fellow knew how to charge...
You truly get the sense that this is sacred ground.
Indeed! Give me chills just to be here!
Uwaaah! A golem!?
Are those seals or hammers in its hands?
Why not both?
Nothing to it!
It certainly kept us on our toes!
Is it over...? My head's spinning something fierce.
It seems that was a test of judgment in the heat of battle.
Ahhh, that was refreshing!
A cavern now... This is turning out to be quite a tour.
A cavernous space behind a portentious gate... This ought to be good!
This is it my friends—the final test!
So that's a yol!
This day, we shall be as warriors born anew!
Hear, hear!
One test down!
There is no telling what awaits. Let us remain vigilant.
It appears these beasts are our next test.
No mistaking who the leader is.
That creature was utterly fearless.
Aye, a warrior in its own right.
You truly get the sense that this is sacred ground.
Indeed! Give me chills just to be here!
The stone is alive! What sorcery is this!?
Whatever it is, it's ingenious!
Are those seals or hammers in its hands?
Why not both?
Nothing to it!
It certainly kept us on our toes!
Is it over...? My head's spinning something fierce.
It seems that was a test of judgment in the heat of battle.
Ahhh, that was refreshing!
A cavern now... This is turning out to be quite a tour.
This bird motif...
I daresay we are come to the yol's nest!
This is it my friends—the final test!
So that's a yol!
This day, we shall be as warriors born anew!
Hear, hear!
Nice of them to afford us the chance to limber up.
It appears these beasts are our next test.
No mistaking who the leader is.
That creature was utterly fearless.
Aye, a warrior in its own right.
That such a place should exist in the Steppe!
The stone is alive! What sorcery is this!?
Whatever it is, it's ingenious!
What an enormous foe!
Nothing to it!
It certainly kept us on our toes!
Whew, such a scramble that was...
After that dip, I'm glad for the warmth of the torches.
This bird motif...
I daresay we are come to the yol's nest!
'Twould seem we've reached the path's end.
Well fought back there, Forename . Things got hairy at times, but I knew we'd manage!
Oh, right. I've still got those whistles Cirina gave me.
Here's yours. I suppose we ought to give them a try like she said.
Up there, look!
I think this means we've won them over. That one there is yours, right? The other one is mine. Awww...
So that's that, then! We're officially warriors of the Steppe!
One fiendish contraption after another... I shall not soon forget that place.
What's the matter, Gosetsu? Don't tell me you've thrown out your back.
I should've known you'd be the first to make it through.
I'm assuming you had no trouble? Good, good. I managed somehow, as you may have guessed.
Looks like Hien and Gosetsu are still in there, though. Nothing for it but to wait, then.
